inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: The horizontal length of the wall in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The horizontal length of the wall in meters.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die horizontale Länge der Wand in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur horizontale du mur en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud horizontal del muro en metros.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: The height of the wall from base to top in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The height of the wall from base to top in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvarın tabandan tepeye metre cinsinden yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Höhe der Wand von der Basis bis zur Spitze in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La hauteur du mur de la base au sommet en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: La altura del muro desde la base hasta la parte superior en metros.

inputs.label: Number of Leaves
inputs.businessContext: The thickness of the wall in terms of brick leaves (1 for half-brick, 2 for full brick, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: The thickness of the wall in terms of brick leaves (1 for half-brick, 2 for full brick, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvarın tuğla sırası cinsinden kalınlığı (1 yarım tuğla, 2 tam tuğla vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dicke der Wand in Ziegelblättern (1 für Halbziegel, 2 für Vollziegel usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'épaisseur du mur en nombre de feuilles de briques (1 pour demi-brique, 2 pour brique entière, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: El espesor del muro en términos de hojas de ladrillo (1 para medio ladrillo, 2 para ladrillo completo, etc.).

inputs.label: Brick Length
inputs.businessContext: Standard brick length (e.g., 215mm for UK format).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard brick length (e.g., 215mm for UK format).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart tuğla uzunluğu (örneğin, İngiltere formatı için 215mm).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur standard de la brique (ex. 215 mm pour le format UK).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud estándar del ladrillo (ej., 215 mm para formato UK).

inputs.label: Brick Height
inputs.businessContext: Standard brick height (e.g., 65mm for UK format).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard brick height (e.g., 65mm for UK format).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart tuğla yüksekliği (örneğin, İngiltere formatı için 65mm).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur standard de la brique (ex. 65 mm pour le format UK).
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura estándar del ladrillo (ej., 65 mm para formato UK).

inputs.label: Mortar Joint Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Typical mortar joint thickness between bricks (e.g., 10mm).

label_i18n.es: Espesor de la junta de mortero

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical mortar joint thickness between bricks (e.g., 10mm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tuğlalar arasındaki tipik harç derz kalınlığı (örneğin, 10mm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Mörtelfugendicke zwischen Ziegeln (z. B. 10 mm).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur typique du joint de mortier entre les briques (ex. 10 mm).
businessContext_i18n.es: Grosor típico de la junta de mortero entre ladrillos (ej., 10 mm).

inputs.label: Wastage Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Allowance for cutting and breakage as a percentage (e.g., 5% => extra 5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowance for cutting and breakage as a percentage (e.g., 5% => extra 5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve kırılma payı yüzdesi (örneğin, %5 => ek %5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuschlag für Schnitt und Bruch als Prozentsatz (z. B. 5 % => zusätzlich 5 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge pour coupe et casse en pourcentage (ex. 5% => 5% supplémentaire).
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen para corte y rotura como porcentaje (ej., 5% => 5% extra).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
